protocols.title: Modern Protocols
protocols.subtitle: Choose the right protocol for your needs
protocols.amneziaDesc: Bypass blocks with WireGuard speed. Our recommended protocol.
protocols.wireguardDesc: Industry standard. Minimal latency, maximum reliability.
protocols.vlessDesc: Traffic masquerading as regular HTTPS. Ultimate stealth mode.

flow.title: How It Works
flow.subtitle: See what happens to your traffic — and how VPN protects it
flow.noVpnDeviceDesc: You open a website or app. Your device sends a request through your internet provider.
flow.noVpnIspDesc: Your provider routes the traffic. Even with HTTPS, the ISP infrastructure contains special equipment the provider has no control over.
flow.noVpnDpiDesc: Government-mandated machines installed at ISP level — the provider cannot disable or remove them. DPI analyzes packet headers, server name indicators (SNI), response patterns, and traffic fingerprints. It can also probe the destination server directly to verify what service is actually running there. If the destination matches the blocklist — the connection is terminated.
flow.noVpnBlockedDesc: DPI determined the destination is on the blocklist. The connection is dropped — you see an error page or a block notice.
flow.vpnDeviceDesc: The VPN app encrypts all outgoing traffic before it leaves your device. No one outside can read it.
flow.vpnTunnelDesc: Your data is wrapped in a secure encrypted tunnel. From the outside, it looks like an unreadable stream of bytes.
flow.vpnIspDesc: Your ISP sees encrypted traffic passing through but cannot read, analyze, or determine its contents.
flow.vpnDpiDesc: DPI tries to analyze headers and probe the destination — but our protocols are designed to outsmart it.
flow.vpnMasqueradeDesc: When DPI probes our server, it responds as a regular allowed website (e.g., a government portal or mail.ru). DPI checks the headers, visits the address, sees legitimate HTTPS — and lets the traffic through.
flow.vpnServerDesc: Located in another country, outside the DPI's reach. It decrypts your traffic and forwards it to the actual destination.
flow.vpnInternetDesc: Full unrestricted access to any website or service. No blocks, no surveillance, no limits.

pricingTeaser.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricingTeaser.subtitle: No hidden fees. No surprises. Cancel anytime.

features.heroTitle: Why Our VPN is Faster and More Reliable
features.heroSubtitle: Modern protocols, zero logs, all platforms. Built for speed and privacy.
features.amneziaDetails: Built on WireGuard with added obfuscation layer. Bypasses DPI-based blocks while maintaining near-native WireGuard speed. Best for regions with active censorship.
features.wireguardDetails: The industry standard for modern VPN connections. Extremely fast with minimal overhead. Ideal when you need raw speed without obfuscation.
features.vlessDetails: Traffic looks identical to regular HTTPS browsing. Virtually undetectable by deep packet inspection. The ultimate fallback when other protocols are blocked.
features.privacySubtitle: We don't track, store, or sell any of your data. Ever.
features.platformsSubtitle: Native apps for every major platform.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Download our app, enter your activation key, and tap Connect. That's it — the entire process takes under a minute.
faq.a2: We support AmneziaWG (recommended), WireGuard, and VLESS/XRay. The app automatically selects the best protocol for your connection.
faq.q3: Can I use it on multiple devices?
faq.a3: Yes! Depending on your plan, you can connect 3 to 10 devices simultaneously with a single subscription.
faq.a4: We provide live support through Telegram. Real humans, not bots — with typical response times under 5 minutes.
faq.a5: Absolutely. We maintain a strict zero-logs policy. We don't track, store, or sell any of your data.

finalCta.title: Ready to Get Started?
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who already enjoy fast, private internet.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Simple plans with no hidden conditions. Every plan includes all protocols and unlimited bandwidth.
pricing.faqQ1: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faqA1: We accept credit cards, cryptocurrency, and various local payment methods.
pricing.faqA2: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. We'll prorate the difference.
pricing.faqA3: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. No questions asked.
pricing.faqQ4: How do I activate my subscription?
pricing.faqA4: After payment, you'll receive an activation key. Enter it in the app and you're good to go.

footer.description: Fast and secure VPN with modern protocols.
